const BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"";async function request(method,path,body){const opts={method,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}};if(body)opts.body=JSON.stringify(body);const res=await fetch("".concat(BASE,"/api").concat(path),opts);const data=await res.json();if(!data.ok)throw new Error(data.error||"Request failed");return data;}export const api={// Drivers
getDrivers:()=>request("GET","/drivers"),addDriver:body=>request("POST","/drivers",body),updateDriver:(id,fields)=>request("PATCH","/drivers/".concat(id),fields),deleteDriver:id=>request("DELETE","/drivers/".concat(id)),// Riders
getRiders:()=>request("GET","/riders"),addRider:body=>request("POST","/riders",body),updateRider:(id,fields)=>request("PATCH","/riders/".concat(id),fields),deleteRider:id=>request("DELETE","/riders/".concat(id)),// Requests
getCurrentRequests:()=>request("GET","/requests/current"),getAllRequests:()=>request("GET","/requests"),updateStatus:(id,status)=>request("PATCH","/requests/".concat(id,"/status"),{status}),assignDriver:(id,body)=>request("POST","/requests/".concat(id,"/assign"),body),deleteRequest:id=>request("DELETE","/requests/".concat(id)),// Notify
sendNotification:()=>request("POST","/notify"),getNotifyLog:()=>request("GET","/notify/log"),// Stats
getStats:()=>request("GET","/stats")};
